leadText: Tapu Village (Japanese: カプの村 Kapu Village) is the site of a former village located on Ula'ula Island of the Alola region.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Tapu Village mostly consists of ruins of buildings that were destroyed by Tapu Bulu , due to a Thrifty Megamart being built on its sacred grounds nearby. As such, the only functioning building in the village is the Pokémon Center . The village also houses the entrance to Mount Lanakila . In Sun and Moon , the player cannot access the mountain at all until they've defeated Lusamine in Ultra Space , while in Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon , the base of the mountain is accessible as soon as the player first visits the village.

sections.title: Demographics
sections.text: Demographics [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sun and Moon [ edit | edit source ] The population of Tapu Village is 13, making it the smallest town in Alola . This is likely due to the destruction of most of the village by Tapu Bulu.
